name: Feature request
about: Propose a Fairy OS improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement

---

## Fairy / module

Which fairy or module does this affect?

## Desired outcome

What should the user be able to do?

## Permission impact

Does this read, write, send, delete, post, spend, or submit anything?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Permission behavior is visible
- [ ] Docs are updated if architecture changes
